hero_tagline: "I write code to solve real problems — with attention to detail and eagerness to keep learning."
about_title:
Who I am and
where I come from
about_p1: I am Roger Muntané, graduated in the Higher National Diploma in Web Application Development (DAW) at the Thos i Codina Center in Mataró (2024–2026). What led me to this path was the ability to build concrete and functional things — from an interface that the user touches to the architecture that supports it underneath.
about_p2: During my training I have worked on both frontend and backend projects, and I realized that I feel comfortable across the whole stack. I am especially drawn to everything related to the backend and service architecture, but without losing sight of design and user experience.
about_p3: My short-term goal is to join a team where I can grow professionally, learn from more experienced peers, and contribute from day one with clean code and a proactive attitude.
about_quote: "Three of my main projects have been collaborative. I adapt quickly to teams and learn much more working with other people than alone."
card1_desc: I have collaborated on projects of 2 and 3 people using Git, GitLab and agile methodologies with Jira and Trello.
card2_desc: I like to understand why things fail. From architecture bugs to CORS issues in production.
card3_desc: Each project has led me to learn new technologies: Docker, Stripe, 2FA, microservices. There is always something new to explore.
card4_desc: From code naming to UI design. Small details make the difference between a good product and a great one.
card5_desc: Catalan (native) · Spanish (native) · English (B1–B2). Capable of reading technical documentation in English without problems.
edu1_desc: Higher level training cycle covering the design and development of complete web applications: frontend, backend, databases, deployment and security. Throughout the cycle I have worked with modern frameworks, REST architectures, Docker containers and teamwork methodologies.
edu2_desc: 6 months of internship in a company specialized in the implementation and customization of Odoo. First contact with a real business environment: methodologies, work rhythms and real client needs.
edu3_desc: Python initiation course complementing official training. It covers the fundamentals of the language, data structures, functions and object orientation.
proj1_desc: Complete parking management platform with microservices architecture: two independent backends (Python Flask and PHP), real payments with Stripe, social authentication via Google OAuth 2.0, PDF ticket generation, image optimization with Cloudinary and complete orchestration with Docker Compose.
proj1_challenge: Coordinate two independent backend services (Python Flask and PHP) that share JWT tokens without coupling. It required designing a shared authentication middleware and managing communication between services via internal Docker networking.
proj2_desc: Cluedo-style mystery game built with Alex Potlog. Django backend with REST API, native session system and admin panel; Vue 3 frontend with police dossier aesthetics, real-time timer, persistent history of attempts and agent statistics per user.
proj2_challenge: Keep the secret solution always on the backend without ever leaking it to the client. Required properly designing the endpoints and managing the case states with Django TextChoices, revealing the solution only when the case was closed.
proj2_role: Full-stack development and Cluedo web integration
proj3_desc: Platform to share travel experiences with route publishing, voting system, reports, differentiated roles (admin, moderator, user), two-factor authentication (2FA), interactive maps with Leaflet and OpenStreetMap, search engine with debounce and filtering by country and category.
proj3_challenge: Implement the roles and permissions system with custom middleware in Laravel, ensuring that each role saw exactly what they should see. Furthermore, integrating Inertia.js as a bridge between Laravel and React without breaking the backend routing.
contact_intro: I am looking for my first professional opportunity. If your team needs a motivated junior developer, with a solid base and eager to learn from day one, I would very much like to talk with you.
form_msg_ph: Tell me how I can help or what opportunity you have...
